message:
feat: cross-artifact witness-replay e2e suite (asupersync-3cddg.12.6)

7 e2e witness scenarios replaying canonical witnesses from the witness pack:
- W1.1: Race loser drain (runtime fuzz + oracle verification)
- W1.3: Undrained loser detection (designed failure, oracle catches it)
- W5.1: Join associativity (exhaustive 4x4x4 = 64 triples)
- W5.2: Race commutativity (all 16 outcome pairs)
- W5.3: Timeout min law (5 boundary cases including MAX)
- W2.1: Cancel kind severity mapping (all 11 variants)
- W7.1: Seed equivalence (deterministic certificate hashes)

Plus cross-artifact summary producer (NDJSON + coverage report) and
50-seed multi-seed stability regression generator. All witnesses produce
structured log entries conforming to sem-verification-log-v1 schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
